channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fry's 2-run homer, squeeze bunt lead Guardians over Tigers 5-4 and force ALDS Game 5
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Pinch-hitter David Fry had a go-ahead, two-run homer in the seventh inning, then bunted home an insurance run in the ninth to help the Cleveland Guardians force a decisive Game 5 against the Detroit Tigers in their AL Division Series with a 5-4 victory on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Greek soccer player George Baldock found dead in Athens home; investigators rule out foul play
item.description: Reuters reported that police attempted to resuscitate George Baldock after his body was found at the home just outside of Athens, Greece.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver says league will play games in China 'at some point' again
item.description: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver said Thursday in New York he believes the league's relationship with China has mended to the point games will be played there again.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rays react to Hurricane Milton decimating their home Tropicana Field roof
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays have reacted to the destruction of their home Tropicana Field, which saw half of its roof torn to shreds by the destructive winds of Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tropicana Field shredded by Hurricane Milton is the latest sports venue damaged by weather
item.description: Roof panels atop the home of the Tampa Bay Rays were ripped to shreds by Hurricane Milton, scattering debris across the field and throughout the seating areas after the deadly storm barreled across Florida.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former England manager Gareth Southgate says he won't coach in the next year
item.description: ATHENS, Greece (AP) — Former England coach Gareth Southgate said Thursday he will be taking a year away from a club or national team job, after speculation he could be a target for Manchester United. “I won’t coach in the next year, for sure.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giancarlo Stanton hits go-ahead homer in the eighth, Yankees beat Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of the ALDS
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Giancarlo Stanton hit a go-ahead homer in the eighth inning amid a battle of bullpens, and the New York Yankees beat the Kansas City Royals 3-2 on Wednesday night in Game 3 of their AL Division Series at Kauffman Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Fire FC names Gregg Berhalter, former U.S. Men's National Team coach, as director of football and head coach
item.description: CHICAGO — Chicago Fire FC has hired former U.S. Men's National Soccer Team head coach Gregg Berhalter as its head coach and director of football, the Major League Soccer team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Raccoon sparks chaos in stands during Broncos game against Raiders
item.description: Football fans packed Empower Field in Denver on Sunday to watch the Broncos take on the Las Vegas Raiders, but they weren’t the only ones in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams, Bears offense overwhelm Panthers, advance to 3-2
item.description: CHICAGO — Caleb Williams continued his improvement with a breakout game Sunday against the Carolina Panthers, as the Chicago Bears used a first-half offensive blitz to cruise to an easy victory Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Padres fandom in full force at first of three postseason watch parties
item.description: The Padres' quest for postseason glory continues and fans are along for the thrilling journey. Despite Saturday night's game being held in Los Angeles at Dodgers Stadium, the first of three watch parties kicked off with a packed house at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz counting on Hendricks and George to take big strides
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With its commitment to a youth movement, the Utah Jazz are counting on Keyonte George and Taylor Hendricks to both take big strides in their second seasons this year. After playing in 75 games as a rookie, George wore down a bit at the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cal WBB player makes a splash with sneaker design
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (KRON) -- Hooper by day, artist by night. That's life for Cal Berkeley women's basketball player Jayda Noble. The senior guard has balanced her nonstop basketball schedule with her other passion -- sneaker design.
item.dc:creator: Jason Dumas, KRON4

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Is the Chicago Bears run game back?
item.description: The Chicago Bears are relying on their running game and short passing game to replicate their Week 4 performance against the Carolina Panthers, as they have shifted away from a run-dominant offense under their new offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
